---
title: "MANTA Gallery"
---

MANTA Gallery is a lightweight browser-based gallery for visualizing tsunami wave amplitude and landslide material fields exported from MANTA/PyVista.

The gallery focuses on curated scientific visualization rather than online computation.

## Core visualization concept

- DEM base layer: sea-split topobathymetry
- Water surface: wave amplitude using the Tsunami colormap
- Landslide material: hm, m, or Δb using magma
- Separate solid-fraction thresholds for water-like and landslide-dominated regions

## Gallery status

This repository is currently under active development.
